title: selenicereus inermis subsp. wercklei
intro: Selenicereus inermis subsp. wercklei, also known as the Wercklei's night-blooming cereus, is a cactus species that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing pain, inflammation, and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The herbal preparations of the Selenicereus inermis subsp. wercklei plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
